headline: What Makes United Rentals (URI) One of the Top Industrial Distribution Names to Look at
summary: United Rentals Inc. (NYSE:URI) is one of the 10 best industrial distribution stocks to invest in according to hedge funds. The company remains committed to enhancing its AI-enabled capabilities. Back on May 19, it announced the expansion of its AI-powered Equipment Agent to the ChatGPT platform.
